revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:

with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>n<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>n<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>]] }}</n<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>n<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>u<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: remove Unreferenced Kent - template was deleted recently per T3 and is no longer used
Undid revision 869310455 by [[Special:Contributions/Mr. Guye|Mr. Guye]] ([[User talk:Mr. Guye|talk]])
inline templates belong at [[Template:Inline cleanup tags]]
Undid revision 900970598 by [[Special:Contributions/LaundryPizza03|LaundryPizza03]] ([[User talk:LaundryPizza03|talk]]) not really citation related
this entry now redirects to another
+section templates, not sure why they weren't included

Protected "[[Template:Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 283 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:39:03 on [[Template:Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates]]
remove Unreferenced Kent - template was deleted recently per T3 and is no longer used
Undid revision 869310455 by [[Special:Contributions/Mr. Guye|Mr. Guye]] ([[User talk:Mr. Guye|talk]])
inline templates belong at [[Template:Inline cleanup tags]]
Undid revision 900970598 by [[Special:Contributions/LaundryPizza03|LaundryPizza03]] ([[User talk:LaundryPizza03|talk]]) not really citation related
this entry now redirects to another
+section templates, not sure why they weren't included
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_and_verifiability_article_maintenance_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_and_verifiability_article_maintenance_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name      = Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates
| title     = [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup/Verifiability and sources|Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates]]
| listclass = hlist
| state     = {{{state|autocollapse}}}

| group1    = Sourcing
| list1     =
* {{Tlg|Circular}}
* {{Tlg|Dubious}}
* {{Tlg|Excessive citations}}
* {{Tlg|Further reading cleanup}}
* {{Tlg|Independent sources}}
* {{Tlg|More citations needed}}
** {{Tlg|More citations needed section}}
* {{Tlg|More footnotes needed}}
* {{Tlg|No footnotes}}
* {{Tlg|No reliable sources}}
* {{Tlg|No significant coverage}}
* {{Tlg|One source}}
** {{Tlg|One source section}}
* {{Tlg|Only primary sources}}
** {{Tlg|NRIS only}}
* {{Tlg|Primary sources}}
** {{Tlg|Primary sources section}}
* {{Tlg|Religious text primary}}
* {{Tlg|Self-published}}
* {{Tlg|Self-reference cleanup}}
* {{Tlg|Self-sourcing examples}}
** {{Tlg|Refexample section}}
* {{Tlg|Sources exist}}
* {{Tlg|Text-source}}
* {{Tlg|Unreferenced}}
** {{Tlg|Unreferenced section}}
* {{Tlg|Unreferenced category}}
* {{Tlg|Unreliable sources}}
** {{Tlg|Unreliable sources section}}
* {{tlg|User-generated}}

| group2    = [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|BLP]]-specific
| list2     =
* {{Tlg|BLP unreferenced}}
** {{Tlg|BLP unreferenced section}}
* {{Tlg|BLP primary sources}}
* {{Tlg|BLP self-published}}
* {{Tlg|BLP sources}}
** {{Tlg|BLP sources section}}
* {{Tlg|BLP no footnotes}}
* {{Tlg|BLP more footnotes needed}}
* {{Tlg|BLP one source}}

| group3    = Topic specific
| list3     =
* {{Tlg|Localist}}
* {{Tlg|Media IMDb refimprove}}
* {{Tlg|More medical citations needed}}
* {{Tlg|More science citations needed}}
* {{Tlg|Neologism}}
* {{Tlg|Science review}}
* {{Tlg|Unreferenced law}}
* {{Tlg|Unreferenced medical section}}

| group4    = Dispute-related
| list4     =
* {{Tlg|Cite check}}
** {{Tlg|Cite check section}}
* {{Tlg|Content}}
* {{Tlg|Disputed}}
** {{Tlg|Dispute about}}
** {{Tlg|Disputed section}}
** {{Tlg|Disputed chem}}
** {{Tlg|Disputed list}}
** {{Tlg|Disputed map}}
* {{Tlg|Expert needed}}
* {{Tlg|Hoax}}
* {{Tlg|Original research}}
** {{Tlg|Original research section}}
* {{Tlg|Speculation}}
** {{Tlg|Speculation section}}
* {{Tlg|Synthesis}}
* {{Tlg|Verifiability}}
* {{Tlg|Verify sources}}

| group5    = Citation improvements
| list5     =
* {{Tlg|Citation style}}
* {{Tlg|Citations broken}}
* {{Tlg|Cleanup bare URLs}}
* {{Tlg|Format footnotes}}
* {{Tlg|Full citations needed}}
* {{Tlg|Ibid}}
* {{Tlg|Page numbers improve}}
* {{Tlg|Page numbers needed}}
* {{Tlg|Parenthetical referencing}}
* {{Tlg|Shallow references}}

| group6 = General advice
| list6 =
* [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]]
* [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|Reliable sources]]
* [[Help:Maintenance template removal |Maintenance template removal]]
* [[Wikipedia:Citation needed|Citation needed]]
* [[Help:Find sources|Find sources]]
* [[Wikipedia:Combining sources|Combining sources]]
* [[Help:Overview of referencing styles|Referencing styles]]

}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
